sizing_rule.note: Convert daily dollar P&L to HPR (profit/loss ÷ account equity) to standardize position sizing across different contract quantities. Use population standard deviation of daily HPRs as volatility measure for position sizing calculations. Specific optimal_f value not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Convert daily dollar gains and losses into Holding Period Returns (HPRs) to make position size irrelevant and standardize performance measurement across different contract quantities.
